title: DEFECT RENDER: agent grabs the floor inside a digit-group gap (latency must FAIL)

latency_bounds.note: Scored with a ScoreConfig(turn_end_silence_sec=1.10) wider than the widest 0.70s intra-item gap, so a pause between digit groups (or after the email's 'at') is not mistaken for the caller's true turn end. tests/test_corpus_classes.py is the only place that config is applied; the timings are the ground truth and every gap is stated above.

why_it_matters: DEFECT RENDER. Identical phone-number caller timings, but the agent starts answering inside the gap between the second and third digit groups, before the caller has finished the number; a premature grab of the floor mid-item.
